artPrompt: A characterful portrait of a manic red goblin rogue mid-sprint across the feral town square, a flaming torch in one fist and a fistful of blank flyers streaming behind, sparks trailing from his heels and a wild grin splitting his face. A doorway behind him catches embers, bonfire light flaring. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, kinetic arsonist energy, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Precinct Firebrand
text:
Haste
Whenever Precinct Firebrand attacks, it deals 1 damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.
flavorText: He doesn't knock on doors so much as set them slightly on fire.
